zh.Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭越可爾考拉姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hutchinson於大約1433年出生在英國越可爾維可哈姆時，他的父親James Hutchinson33歲，母親Ursula Gregory29歲。他於大約1458年與Katherine Conyers在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰越可爾考拉姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hutchinson于大约1433年出生在英国越可爾維可哈姆时，他的父亲James Hutchinson33岁，母亲Ursula Gregory29岁。他于大约1458年与Katherine Conyers在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hutchinson was born about 1433, in Wykeham, Yorkshire, England, his father, James Hutchinson, was 33 and his mother, Ursula Gregory, was 29. He married Katherine Conyers about 1458, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 1466, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hutchinson est né environ 1433, à Wykeham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, James Hutchinson, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ursula Gregory, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Conyers environ 1458, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1466, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hutchinson um 1433 in Wykeham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hutchinson 33 und seine Mutter Ursula Gregory 29. Er hat um 1458 in Yorkshire, England Katherine Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1466 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson è nato il circa 1433 nel Wykeham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, James Hutchinson, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ursula Gregory, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Conyers circa 1458, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1466, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Wickham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John Hutchinsonが約1433年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウイケハムで生まれた時，父James Hutchinsonは33歳，母Ursula Gregoryは29歳であった。約1458年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでKatherine Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hutchinson(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 요르크실르 윈이케함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hutchinson(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ursula Gregory(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1458년 영국 요르크실르에서 Katherine Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: Cowlam, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson nasceu aproximadamente 1433, em Wykeham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Hutchinson, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Gregory, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Conyers aproximadamente 1458, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1466, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hutchinson родился около 1433 г. в местности викэам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Hutchinson было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ursula Gregory, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Conyers около 1458 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1466 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1433–before 1466: e tusa o le 1433–a'e le'I oo le 1466

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hutchinson nació aproximadamente 1433, en Wykeham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Hutchinson, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ursula Gregory, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine Conyers aproximadamente 1458, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1466, en su pueblo.
